pr_text:
## Title: Fix incorrect physical cell ID extraction in X2AP EN-DC SgNB Addition Request

### Summary
Correct the source of the target physical cell ID when building X2AP ENDC SgNB Addition Request messages during EN-DC procedures. The code was incorrectly reading `physCellId` from LTE neighbor cell measurements (`measResultListEUTRA`) instead of NR neighbor cell measurements (`measResultNeighCellListNR_r15`). Additionally, a hardcoded zero assignment was overwriting the field after it was set. T
